# velia_network (Data Source)

Reads a Velia network. Use `filter_cidr` or `filter_ip` to select a specific network. Errors if the filter matches zero or more than one network.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up by CIDR
data "velia_network" "main" {
  filter_cidr = "192.168.190.96/28"
}

# Look up by an IP within the network
data "velia_network" "by_ip" {
  filter_ip = "192.168.190.100"
}

output "network_id" {
  value = data.velia_network.main.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `filter_cidr` (String) Filter: exact CIDR of the network to look up (e.g. 192.168.190.96/28).
- `filter_ip` (String) Filter: any IP within the network to look up.

### Read-Only

- `broadcast` (String) Broadcast address.
- `cidr` (String) Network CIDR.
- `city` (String) Data center city.
- `country` (String) Data center country (ISO 3166-1 code).
- `gateway` (String) Gateway IP address.
- `id` (String) Network ID.
- `netmask` (String) Subnet mask.
- `network` (String) Network address.
- `prefix_length` (Number) Prefix length.
- `registry` (String) WHOIS registry (e.g. RIPE NCC).
- `resolver` (String) IP of the responsible DNS server.
- `version` (Number) IP version (4 or 6).
